testcase.name: test_material_need_generate_prep_is_long_article
testcase.failure: backend/tests/backend_test.py:106: in test_material_need_generate_prep_is_long_article assert r.status_code == 200, r.text E AssertionError: {"detail":"Could not parse LLM output: Expecting ',' delimiter: line 8 column 368 (char 2218)"} E assert 502 == 200 E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code
